km.Neuenburg, Neuchâtel, Switzerland: នែuchateល, នែueនប៊ើហ្គ, ស្វីស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud von Eberstein於大約1182年出生在瑞士波格a特爾時，她的父親Eberhard von Eberstein III39歲，母親Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien40歲。她和Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud von Eberstein于大约1182年出生在瑞士波格a特爾时，她的父亲Eberhard von Eberstein III39岁，母亲Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien40岁。她和Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Eberstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German ober ‘upper’ + stein ‘rock, stone’, also ‘castle’, hence a habitational or topographic name from the place Idar-Oberstein in Rhineland-Palatinate with the latter part of the name taken from a rock above the town.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud von Eberstein was born about 1182, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland, her father, Eberhard von Eberstein III, was 39 and her mother, Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien, was 40. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud von Eberstein est née environ 1182, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse, son père, Eberhard von Eberstein III, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud von Eberstein um 1182 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eberhard von Eberstein III 39 und ihre Mutter Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien 40. Sie hatte mit Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Eberstein è nata il circa 1182 nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera, sua padre, Eberhard von Eberstein III, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau.

ja.Neuenburg, Neuchâtel, Switzerland: スイスネウエンブルグネウチaテル
ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Ebersteinが約1182年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルで生まれた時，父Eberhard von Eberstein IIIは39歳，母Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranienは40歳であった。彼女はUlrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidauとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Eberstein(이)가 대략 1182년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eberhard von Eberstein III(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Eberstein nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça, seu pai, Eberhard von Eberstein III, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud von Eberstein родилась около 1182 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Eberhard von Eberstein III было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud von Eberstein nació aproximadamente 1182, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza, su papá, Eberhard von Eberstein III, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Kunigunde von Andechs und Meranien, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau.
